name: ng-tabs
title: Tabs (Angular)
description: Tabbed content switcher built on Spartan-ng brain Tabs - Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent. Use for sibling content panels that share a context (settings sections, profile pages). Mirrors React Tabs from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-tabs.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
